SOURCE: 17987433.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (17987433.pdf)
SUMMARY: Seeking a position in the field of Bio-Pharma where I can utilize and contribute my skills in an ingenious manner.
SKILLS: Microbial testing, endotoxin- LAL Test, Nano particle Size and Charge analysis by Malveren Nano ZS 90, Protein extractions, HPLC handling and Chromatography techniques, Polymerase chain reaction (PCR) technique, Method development, Method Validation, Method verification and Method transfer of new analytical methods, Wet chemistry techniques, MS office, SAS programming, Nanotechnology THz biological imaging, Capillary electrophoresis (CE) methods used in submillimeter diameter capillaries and micro- and nanofluidic channels, Biotechnology techniques cytogenetics and PCR methods, Creating SOPs for instrumental analysis, Fundamental lab procedures including pipetting, buffer preparation, weighing, Recording laboratory data and graphing results to identify significant variations, Preparing reports complying with FDA, ISO, cGMP and internal regulations; coordinating material, instrument and process validations, Maintenance and calibration of analytical instruments such as HPLC, UPLC, UV, FT-IR, dissolution apparatus, pH meter and analytical balances, Titanium dioxide nanoparticles with blank terahertz scanning reflectometer, Analytical testing and method development and validation, Confirming the ability to resolve small variations in Ti02 layer thickness and consequently adsorption, Developed new analytical methods based on testing results, Performed a variety of technical laboratory functions in operation and maintenance of laboratory equipment calibrating, Prepared reports complying with FDA, ISO, cGMP and internal regulations; coordinated material, instrument and process validations, Essential to develop a new compound of antibiotics, Isolation, identification, bioprocessing and characterization of secondary metabolites from soil screened microorganisms, Screening of soil actinomycetes from different soil samples, Taxonomical studies for antibiotic producing isolates, Morphological and cultural characterization, Total genomic DNA isolation & PCR & Cloning of polyene CYP gene (cytochrome P-450 hydroxlase), Bioprocessing for antibiotic production, Biological activity such as antimicrobial, cytotoxic, genotoxic activities, GOLD MEDAL for securing highest marks in Master of Pharmacy, JSS College of Pharmacy, Awarded cash price for M. Pharm Dissertation work by Tamil Nadu Pharmaceutical Welfare Trust, Participated in Indo-European Symposium on Alternative Approaches to Annval Testing, Participated in national workshop on potentials of medicinal plants of Nilgiri Biosphere reserve, Indian Pharmaceutical Student Congress-2009 held in Bangalore, Indian pharmaceutical congress-2011 held in Bangalore, Basic Biotechnological experiments (in-vitro and in-vivo), Skillful in handling cell lines, mammalian cell culture, aseptic handling of microorganisms, Electrophoresis Gel-documentation Techniques, DNA isolation and RNA/DNA/protein extractions, Operational knowledge of analytical instrumentation like HPLC, GC, LC/MS, UPLC, TLC, FTIR, UV-VIS spectrophotometer, KF coulometer
